questions.prompt: A customer who needs signatures on iOS and Android can rely on the Outlook Add-in alone, without server-side configuration.
questions.explanation: The Outlook Add-in does not run on iOS or Android. Mobile coverage requires server-side. Combined deployment is the typical answer when the customer also wants previews on Outlook for Windows.

questions.prompt: A customer says 'users must not be able to edit or delete the signature in Outlook'. Which deployment path enforces that?
choices: Client-side via the Signature Update Agent
questions.explanation: Only server-side prevents users from changing signatures. Client-side (either Add-in or Update Agent) gives users access to signatures before send, so they can edit or delete them.
